positive: A central, stylized composition featuring a mystical fox curled around a glowing crescent moon, surrounded by geometric bioluminescent flora and elegant, stylized constellations. The style is ethereal vaporwave gothic meets Art Nouveau illustration. Use strong, high-contrast silhouettes against a deep midnight indigo and cosmic teal background. The composition must be balanced and symmetrical, perfect for repeating textile patterns. Use a mix of line art, clean vector graphics, and soft, radial glow effects. Highly detailed, vibrant colors, pop art quality, trending on POD platforms.
